title: Snap posts Q1 2026 growth, stronger cash flow and cost cuts
text:
Snap posts Q1 2026 growth, stronger cash flow and cost cuts

2026 Revenue Forecast

Revenue is forecast steady at US$6.69 billion according to analyst consensus updates. Revenue forecast for 2026 is $6.85 billion, representing a recovery from prior fiscal year figures.

Q2 2026 Guidance

Management expects Q2 revenue of $1.52–$1.55 billion and Adjusted EBITDA of $175–$200 million.

Earnings Outlook

2026 losses are forecast to reduce from -US$0.149 to -US$0.101 per share. More broadly, analysts forecast that SNAP's EPS will be $0.53 for 2026, with the lowest EPS forecast at $0.34, and the highest EPS forecast at $0.72.

Cost Structure Improvements

A significant element of the outlook includes restructuring efforts. The company expects to reduce its annualized cost structure by more than $500 million in the second half of 2026.

Analyst Sentiment

According to 24 analysts, Snap has a Hold consensus rating as of May 6, 2026, with analyst price targets averaging around $8-8.41 per share.
